narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 5-A (precinct in Ross County) has 528 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
